user.title: Connect to the Niles ZR-6
user.description: Enter the address of the RS232-over-IP bridge connected to the ZR-6.

names.title: Zone and source names
names.description: Give your zones and sources friendly names.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure the bridge connection
reconfigure.description: Update the host/port of the RS232-over-IP bridge.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the ZR-6. Check the host/port and make sure no other client is holding the connection open.

init.title: Niles ZR-6 options
init.description: Change the number of active zones and how often zone status is polled.

names.title: Zone and source names
names.description: Update zone and source names. Entities for removed zones are cleaned up automatically.

all_zones_source.name: All zones: select source (party mode)
all_zones_source.description: Selects a source in all party-mode-enabled zones at once (znt global command). Also powers those zones on.

all_zones_off.name: All zones off
all_zones_off.description: Turns all zones off at once (znt global command).

tune.name: Tune radio
tune.description: Direct-tunes the built-in tuner. FM: 'XXX.X' (e.g. 102.7), AM: 'XXXX' (e.g. 0560). The tuner must be the selected source in the active zone.

send_command.name: Send raw command
send_command.description: Sends a raw protocol command to the ZR-6 and returns the response lines. For diagnostics/advanced use.

command.name: Command
command.description: Raw ASCII command without carriage return, e.g. 'znc,5'.
